title: FeatureFlagDefinition
description: The full definition of a feature flag in a specific environment, including treatments, targeting rules, and rollout configuration.

killed.description: Whether the flag is killed, forcing all evaluations to return the default treatment

treatments.description: List of possible treatments that this feature flag can return

defaultTreatment.description: The treatment returned when no targeting rules match or when the flag is killed

baselineTreatment.description: The control treatment used as a baseline for experimentation

rules.description: Ordered list of targeting rules evaluated top to bottom. The first matching rule determines the treatment.

defaultRule.description: The default rule applied when no targeting rules match. Defines the percentage-based rollout for unmatched traffic.

trafficAllocation.description: Percentage of traffic that is included in the feature flag evaluation (0-100). Traffic outside this allocation receives the default treatment.

lastModified.description: Unix timestamp of the last modification

creationTime.description: Unix timestamp of when the definition was created
